name: reccli
description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Automatically records sessions, builds project context, and gives your agent recall across conversations — no manual note-taking required.

license_key.title: License Key
license_key.description: Your RecCli Pro license key (get one at https://reccli.dev). Leave empty for free tier.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings (enables hybrid search). Optional — BM25 search works without it.
